# Fixture: ana_chagas_itin
# Model: haiku
# Duration: 18.1s
# Exit: 0
# Failures: 0

## CONVERSATION
Concierge: Hi Ana! Welcome to Shiftsmart.
Partner: Can I work with my ITIN Number for now?

## CONCIERGE OUTPUT
Yes — Stripe accepts either an SSN or an ITIN, as long as your full legal name matches what's on file with the IRS.
